fill_in_blanks.sentence: We live in a spacious __________ in the city centre.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我們住在市中心一間寬敞的公寓。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The __________ has two bedrooms and a large living room.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 這間公寓有兩間臥室和一個大客廳。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: I want to buy an __________ near the MTR station.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我想買一間靠近地鐵站的公寓。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The __________ in our house includes a sofa and chairs.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我們房子的傢俬包括沙發和椅子。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: We need to buy some new __________ for the bedroom.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我們需要為臥室買一些新傢俬。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: This __________ is made of high-quality wood.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 這件傢俬是用優質木材製造的。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: We need to buy a new kitchen __________ because the old one is broken.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我們需要買一個新的廚房電器，因為舊的壞了。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: This __________ uses less electricity.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 這個電器用電較少。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The washing machine is an essential home __________.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 洗衣機是一個必不可少的家用電器。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Please put the books back on the __________.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 請把書放回架子上。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The __________ in the kitchen is full of plates.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 廚房的架子上擺滿了碟子。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Can you reach the top __________?
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 你夠得著最上面的架子嗎？

fill_in_blanks.sentence: We live in a __________ house with a big garden.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我們住在一間寬敞的房子，有一個大花園。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The living room is very __________ and bright.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 客廳非常寬敞明亮。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: I love this __________ apartment.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我喜歡這間寬敞的公寓。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: This sofa is very __________ and comfortable.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 這張沙發很舒適溫馨。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The bedroom feels __________ with the warm lights.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 臥室因為暖燈而感覺舒適溫馨。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: I like reading in this __________ corner.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我喜歡在這個舒適的角落閱讀。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: This washing machine is very __________.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 這部洗衣機非常有效率。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: We need to find an __________ way to clean the house.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我們需要找到一個有效率的清潔房屋方法。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: An __________ appliance saves time and energy.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 一個有效率的電器可以節省時間和能源。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: We plan to __________ the kitchen next month.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我們計劃下個月翻新廚房。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: They will __________ the old apartment.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 他們將會翻新這間舊公寓。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: It costs a lot to __________ a house.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 翻新一間房子要花很多錢。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Don't forget to pay the __________ bill.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 不要忘記繳交電費。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The __________ went off during the storm.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 暴風雨期間停電了。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: We use __________ to power our appliances.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我們用電力來運作我們的電器。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Learning English is a difficult __________.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 學習英語是一個困難的挑戰。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: It was a difficult __________, but she never gave up.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 這是個困難的挑戰，但她從不放棄。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Are you ready for this __________?
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 你準備好迎接這個挑戰了嗎？

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The athletes took part in the sports __________ last week.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 運動員們上週參加了體育比賽。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: I won first place in the __________.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我在比賽中贏得了第一名。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The __________ was very exciting.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 這場比賽非常刺激。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The __________ trains hard every day.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 這位運動員每天刻苦訓練。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: She is a famous __________.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 她是一位著名的運動員。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Every __________ wants to win the gold medal.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 每位運動員都想贏得金牌。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Over 100 students will __________ in the race.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 超過100名學生將會參加這場賽跑。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Everyone can __________ in this event.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 每個人都可以參加這個活動。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: I want to __________ in the singing contest.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我想參加歌唱比賽。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Ten teams will __________ for the trophy.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 十隊將會競爭這個獎盃。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The two runners __________ fiercely.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 兩位跑手激烈地競爭。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: It's good to __________ with friends.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 和朋友競爭是好事。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: My parents always __________ me to do my best.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我父母總是鼓勵我盡力而為。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Teachers should __________ their students.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 老師應該鼓勵他們的學生。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Your words __________ me a lot.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 你的話很鼓勵我。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The coach will __________ the names of the winners.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 教練將會宣佈勝利者的名字。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: They will __________ the results tomorrow.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 他們明天會宣佈結果。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Please wait for the teacher to __________.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 請等待老師宣佈。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: My __________ in the final was very strong.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我在決賽中的對手非常強。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: I respect my __________.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我尊重我的對手。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The __________ scored five goals.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 對手射入了五球。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The athletes were __________ after the marathon.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 運動員們在馬拉松後筋疲力盡。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: I feel __________ after swimming.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 游泳後我感到筋疲力盡。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Running 10km made me __________.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 跑10公里令我筋疲力盡。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The __________ starts next Monday.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 錦標賽下星期一開始。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Over 50 teams joined the __________.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 超過50隊參加了這個錦標賽。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The __________ final will be held in the stadium.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 錦標賽決賽將在體育館舉行。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The pizza was very __________.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 這個薄餅非常美味。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: My mother cooks __________ food.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我媽媽煮美味的食物。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: This cake tastes __________.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 這個蛋糕嚐起來很美味。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: I would __________ this restaurant to my friends.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我會向朋友推薦這間餐廳。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Can you __________ a good movie?
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 你可以推薦一部好電影嗎？

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The waiter __________ the special dish.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 侍應推薦了特色菜。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: We need to make a __________ for dinner tonight.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我們需要預訂今晚的晚餐。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: I called to make a __________ at 7pm.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我打電話預訂晚上7點。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The __________ was confirmed by email.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 預訂已通過電郵確認。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The __________ at this restaurant is excellent.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 這間餐廳的服務非常好。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Good __________ makes customers happy.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 良好的服務令顧客開心。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: I was impressed by the __________.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我對服務印象深刻。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The __________ of the restaurant is romantic.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 這間餐廳的氛圍很浪漫。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: I love the __________ here with soft music.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我喜歡這裡伴隨輕柔音樂的氛圍。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The __________ makes dining enjoyable.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 氛圍令用餐變得愉快。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Italian __________ is famous for pasta.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 意大利菜式以意粉聞名。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: I love trying different __________.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我喜歡嘗試不同的菜式。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: French __________ is known for its desserts.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 法式菜式以其甜品聞名。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The __________ brought us the menu.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 男侍應給我們帶來了菜單。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Ask the __________ for more water.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 請男侍應添水。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Our __________ was very polite.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我們的男侍應非常有禮貌。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: Please look at the __________ before ordering.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 點餐前請先看菜單。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The __________ has many choices.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 這份菜單有很多選擇。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: I cannot decide from the __________.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我看著菜單無法決定。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: This restaurant is too __________ for me.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 這間餐廳對我來說太昂貴了。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The steak is very __________.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 這塊牛排非常昂貴。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: I cannot afford this __________ meal.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我負擔不起這頓昂貴的飯。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The restaurant was very __________ on Friday night.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 這間餐廳星期五晚上很擁擠。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: The bus is always __________ in the morning.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 巴士早上總是很擁擠。

fill_in_blanks.sentence: I don't like __________ places.
fill_in_blanks.chinese: 我不喜歡擁擠的地方。

grammar.question: She __________ to school every day.
grammar.explanation: Present Simple - 第三人稱單數用 'goes'

grammar.question: Look! The children __________ in the playground.
grammar.explanation: Present Continuous - 'Look!' 表示正在發生

grammar.question: They __________ a movie last night.
grammar.explanation: Past Simple - 'last night' 是過去時間

grammar.question: While I __________, the phone rang.
grammar.explanation: Past Continuous - 過去進行時被動作打斷

grammar.question: This is the boy __________ won the competition.
The book __________ I bought is interesting.
This is the restaurant __________ we had dinner.
He __________ to the gym three times a week.
Listen! Someone __________ at the door.
grammar.explanation: Present Continuous - 'Listen!' 表示正在發生

grammar.question: They __________ in Hong Kong since 2010.
grammar.explanation: Present Perfect - 'since' 表示從過去到現在

grammar.question: When I arrived, they __________ dinner.
grammar.explanation: Past Continuous - 過去某時正在進行

grammar.question: __________ Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean.
The girl __________ bike was stolen is crying.
This is the school __________ I studied.
The man __________ lives next door is friendly.
My brother __________ in Canada.
grammar.explanation: Present Simple - 第三人稱單數

grammar.question: Be quiet! The baby __________.
grammar.explanation: Present Continuous - 'Be quiet!' 表示正在發生

grammar.question: She __________ to Paris two years ago.
grammar.explanation: Past Simple - 'two years ago' 是過去時間

grammar.question: I was reading when he __________.
grammar.explanation: Past Simple - 打斷過去進行時的動作

grammar.question: We __________ have a party next Saturday.
I saw __________ elephant at the zoo.
The cake __________ she made was delicious.
The house __________ windows are red is mine.
The park __________ we met is beautiful.
My dog __________ in the garden every morning.
Watch out! A car __________ towards us!
grammar.explanation: Present Continuous - 'Watch out!' 表示正在發生

grammar.question: I have never __________ to Japan.
grammar.explanation: Present Perfect - 'have been' 表示經驗

grammar.question: They __________ basketball when I called.
grammar.explanation: Past Continuous - 過去某時正在進行

grammar.question: Last week, I __________ a new phone.
grammar.explanation: Past Simple - 'last week' 是過去時間

grammar.question: The woman __________ you met is my aunt.
The room __________ door is open is empty.
The city __________ I was born is small.
